is situated in one of the most pic
turesque sections Of the entire Pa
cific northwest. with four beautiful
lakes, one of which is four and one
half miles in length, within It's Dor
dars. This tract is especially adapt
ed to the raising of fruit and truck
gardening, and many of those who
have purchased there are making
extensive preparations to enter into
truck gardening and apple raising
as their chief industry. and on a
large scale this summer. Many new
improvements will be added to the
country as well.


In the Vera project, in the valley,
bordering Opportunity on the east,
there is but 1000 acres left from
the original tract of $500 acres.
which was cut into five and 10
acre tracts and placed on the mar
ket but about a year ago This
project is now being handled by
the Sherwood immigration Co,
composed of +. l.. Sherwood and |.
l.. Riggs. 1t is located but five and
a half miles from the east city lim-
its, and splendid school building
costing $4,000, has been built
there recently.


Here, like in the Opportunity
country. the promoters have devi-
ated from the old style of gravity
irrigation. Even the water for irri-
cation purposes here is pumped
through underground concrete
mains, and is under high pressure
